name: 10ct Artificial Christmas Garland Ties - Wondershop™: Indoor/Outdoor Decoration
description:
Secure your garland to a banister, mantel or anywhere else you need a pop of festive flair with the 10-Count of Artificial Christmas Garland Ties from Wondershop™. These artificial greenery garland ties blend in with the garland itself. They're perfect for holiday crafts as well as for effortlessly hanging garlands with a seamless, natural look.

Wondershop™: Welcome to the Wondershop.
